targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, '1h'), SUM(total_requests)::double precision AS requests FROM usage_dashboard_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, '1h'), SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens)::double precision AS total_tokens FROM usage_dashboard_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_date::timestamp, '1d'), SUM(actual_cost)::double precision AS actual_cost FROM usage_dashboard_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_date::timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(requested_model, ''), NULLIF(model, ''), 'unknown') AS model, COUNT(*)::bigint AS requests, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens)::bigint AS tokens, SUM(actual_cost)::double precision AS actual_cost FROM usage_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY actual_cost DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(g.name, CONCAT('group-', u.group_id::text)) AS group_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS requests, SUM(actual_cost)::double precision AS actual_cost, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens)::bigint AS tokens FROM usage_logs u LEFT JOIN groups g ON g.id = u.group_id WHERE $__timeFilter(u.created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY actual_cost DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT u.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(us.username, ''), us.email, u.user_id::text) AS user_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS requests, SUM(actual_cost)::double precision AS actual_cost, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens)::bigint AS tokens FROM usage_logs u LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = u.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(u.created_at) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY actual_cost DESC LIMIT 12

WITH top_users AS (SELECT user_id FROM usage_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens) DESC LIMIT 8) SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(u.created_at, '1h'), COALESCE(NULLIF(us.username, ''), us.email, u.user_id::text) AS metric, SUM(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens + u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)::double precision AS value FROM usage_logs u LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = u.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(u.created_at) AND u.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM top_users) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
